name: com.kidzdev.unity.toast
description: Non-blocking, auto-dismissing notification banners (snackbars) for Unity uGUI. Fire-and-forget Show(), capped stack with newest-evicts-oldest admission, slide+fade transition, no DOTween, no Addressables dependency.

samples.description: Buttons for a default toast, a short toast, an icon+color toast, a burst of 5 (visibly evicts against a cap of 3), a sticky "Connection lost" toast dismissed via its handle, and a second top-anchored manager.
